title: SoFi Technologies Inc (SOFI) Reports Strong Q4 and Fiscal Year 2023 Results
text: SoFi Technologies delivered impressive fourth-quarter results on January 29, 2024. The fintech company reported GAAP net revenue of $615 million in Q4, representing 35% year-over-year growth. For the full fiscal year 2023, revenue reached $2.1 billion, also up 35%. The company achieved record adjusted EBITDA of $181 million in Q4, a 159% increase from the prior year, with a 30% target margin. Most notably, SoFi swung to profitability with positive GAAP net income of $48 million and earnings per share of $0.02 in the quarter. Member acquisition accelerated significantly, with the platform adding nearly 585,000 new members in Q4, bringing the total to over 7.5 million—a 44% annual increase. Product growth was equally robust, with nearly 695,000 new products added during the quarter, pushing total products to 11.1 million. Total deposits expanded by $2.9 billion to $18.6 billion, while tangible book value grew 11% year-over-year. Management projects Q1 2024 adjusted net revenue between $550-$560 million, with adjusted EBITDA of $110-$120 million. For full-year 2024, the company expects combined growth in its Technology Platform and Financial Services segments to exceed 50%.
